dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S2318 RS: Streamlining American Manufacturing Strategy Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Blunt Rochester (for herself and Mr. Budd) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation
Reported by Mr. Cruz, with an amendment
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic

form.official-title: To amend the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act to require the periodic update to the strategic plan to guide the Manufacturing USA Program to align with the mandatory updates to the National Strategy for Advanced Manufacturing.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Streamlining American Manufacturing Strategy Act.

section.header: Alignment of timing of updates of strategic plan with updates to National Strategy for Advanced Manufacturing
section.text: Section 34(i)(2) of the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act (15 U.S.C. 278s(i)(2)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (C), by striking and update not less frequently than once every 3 years thereafter,;
by redesignating subparagraphs (D) through (M) as subparagraphs (E) through (N), respectively; and
by inserting after subparagraph (C), the following:

subparagraph.text: to update the strategic plan developed under subparagraph (C) not less frequently than once every 4 years and such that the planning cycle for the updates aligns with the planning cycle for updates to the National Strategy for Advanced Manufacturing required under section 102(c)(4) of the America COMPETES Reauthorization Act of 2010 (42 U.S.C. 6622(c)(4)) to better ensure the Program reflects the priorities of the national strategy;

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Streamlining American Manufacturing Strategy Act.

section.header: Alignment of timing of updates of strategic plan with updates to National Strategy for Advanced Manufacturing

subsection.text: Paragraph (2) of section 34(i) of the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act (15 U.S.C. 278s(i)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (C), by striking and update not less frequently than once every 3 years thereafter,;
by redesignating subparagraphs (D) through (M) as subparagraphs (E) through (N), respectively; and
by inserting after subparagraph (C), the following:

subparagraph.text: to update the strategic plan developed under subparagraph (C) not less frequently than once every 4 years such that the planning cycle for the updates aligns with the planning cycle for updates to the National Strategy for Advanced Manufacturing required under section 102(c)(4) of the America COMPETES Reauthorization Act of 2010 (42 U.S.C. 6622(c)(4)) to better ensure the Program reflects the priorities of the national strategy;

paragraph.text: in paragraph (3), by striking paragraph (2)(C) and inserting subparagraphs (C) and (D) of paragraph (2); and
in paragraph (4), by striking paragraph (2)(C) and inserting subparagraph (C) of paragraph (2) and any update to the plan required under subparagraph (D) of such paragraph.
